steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The text moves chronologically: original ticker tape was used in 1924 → it was retired before the 2019 parade → at that 2019 parade something else was used. The blank introduces what came next in time.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Then signals the next step in the sequence — by 2019, shredded standard paper replaced ticker tape. 'With this in mind' implies a conclusion drawn, 'In addition' adds a parallel item, and 'In other words' restates.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
